expectations.evidence: "### Step 1: Bezwaar (Administrative Objection) - Art. 7:1 Awb" and "A formal written objection filed with the **same administrative body** (the gemeente)" - bezwaar procedure fully explained
"**Deadline**: **6 weeks** from the day after the decision was sent or published (Art. 6:7-6:8 Awb)" - 6-week deadline explicitly stated multiple times
"**Algemene wet bestuursrecht (Awb)** - the foundational procedural statute" with extensive citation of specific Awb articles including Art. 1:2, 3:2, 6:7-6:8, 7:1-7:13, 8:1-8:86, 8:81
"### Step 2: Beroep (Appeal to the Rechtbank) - Art. 8:1 Awb" and "you can appeal to the **bestuursrechter** (administrative law judge) at the **Rechtbank**"
